ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the stock price compared to the previous day */,
  "overlap" INTEGER /* Overlap value indicating a specific metric or flag (e.g., 1 for overlap) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company associated with the stock symbol */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Finance) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Hardware) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value indicating the stock's volatility relative to the market */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overlap_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overlap metric entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the metric entry */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the overlap metric (e.g., Volume, Volatility) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the overlap metric */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the overlap metric data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to calculate the overlap metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overlap_metrics_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, manager, investor) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., analyst, manager, investor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial entry */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) for the fiscal year */,
  "dividends" REAL /* Dividends paid by the company for the fiscal year */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company for the fiscal year */,
  "cash_flow" REAL /* Cash flow from operations for the fiscal year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index entry */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index (e.g., S&P 500, NASDAQ) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the index value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the market index on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the index value compared to the previous day */,
  "high_value" REAL /* Highest value of the market index on the given date */,
  "low_value" REAL /* Lowest value of the market index on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades in the market index on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio holding */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user holding the stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the holding */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Purchase price of the stock */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock was purchased */,
  "current_price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the holding */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of users or roles who can view the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value of the alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, MSFT) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the historical data entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades on the given date */,
  "adj_close_price" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in the stock price compared to the previous day */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol")
)
